QueueText:
<color=orange>{queue_server}</color> <color=white>is full</color>
<color=white>You are </color><color=orange>{queue_position_ordinal}</color><color=white> in the queue</color>

<color=orange>{alt_server}</color> <color=white>has </color><color=orange>{alt_online}/{alt_max}</color><color=white> players online</color>
<color=white>Press </color><color=orange>[ALT]</color><color=white> to connect</color>
AddedToQueueLog: Added (f=cyan){user_id}(f=white) to the (f=yellow){server_name}(f=white) queue at position (f=green){queue_position}(f=white).
NullSessionLog: (f=red)Failed to remove a player from the queue because the session was null.(f=white)
